title: HMF 46800900 Acrylic Display Case for Model Cars / Figures, Various Sizes, Transparent, 24 x 11 x 12 cm
features: Protected: robust display case prevents dust and damage to collectibles.
High quality: scratch-resistant, crystal clear and UV-resistant acrylic plastic without yellowing.
Versatile: perfectly display model cars, collectible figures or tabletop miniatures.
Elegant: heavy black base plate with mirror effect for optimal presentation.
description: Product Description High-quality display cases for your collectibles Perfect presentation Each display case comes with a sturdy acrylic lid and an elegant black base plate , which ensures a secure stand and creates beautiful reflections . So you can be sure that your collectibles are optimally protected and perfectly presented . Huge range of sizes We offer a variety of different display case sizes to meet your individual requirements. Whether you have small figures or larger models, we have the right display case in portrait or landscape format for you! HMF acrylic display cases 46800 The perfect solution for presenting and protecting your valuable collectibles The display cases are ideal for protecting your favourite collectible from dust, damage, touching and UV rays , while also showing it off to its best advantage. The glass-clear, removable acrylic lid provides an optimal view and also allows easy access to the contents. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. HMF Vitrinen Merchant video Previous page Elegant design The elegant black base plate makes your presentation object shine. Robust acrylic 4 mm thick acrylic protects against dust, damage from touching and UV rays. Perfect presentation Showcase your model cars, collectibles or tabletop miniatures perfectly. Tailored to your requirements A versatile showcase for private collections, trade fairs, exhibitions and museums. Discreet and functional No assembly required! Simply place the acrylic lid on the base plate -done! Easy cleaning guaranteed Next page 1 Perfectly presented 2 high-quality 3 Model cars and more 4 Size selection 5 Easy to use THE HMF SHOWCASES MADE OF HIGH-QUALITY GLASS-CLEAR ACRYLIC Discover the perfect solution for presenting and protecting your valuable collectibles with our high-quality acrylic showcases! No matter whether you want to display model cars, figures or other precious objects, our showcases offer you the ideal combination of aesthetics and security. The sturdy, unbreakable, 4 mm thick acrylic ensures a clear view of your collectible and protects it from dust, damage from touching and UV rays. Each display case is equipped with a stable base plate for a secure stand . The black acrylic plastic of the base plate with an elegant mirror effect also ensures beautiful reflections that optimally showcase your product. The showcases blend harmoniously into any environment thanks to their clean lines and simple, modern look. They are therefore not only ideal for private collectors of model cars (scales: 1:18 / 1:24 / 1:32 / 1:43) and figures , but are also perfect for presenting works of art, memorabilia and for professional exhibitions and trade fairs . Whether in the living room, in the office or at a trade fair – our display cases are versatile, available in various sizes and formats and fit into any environment. And the best thing is: no assembly is needed to set up the display cases. Simply place the acrylic lid on the base plate – done! Our display cases allow you to show off every item in your collection in the right light while also protecting it. Our acrylic display cases are not only functional, but also a real eye-catcher. Let your collectibles shine in new splendour and get the perfect display case for your valuable treasures!
